description: Contratos de integración entre layers. Valida que los archivos se respetan entre sí, no solo internamente.

integration_contracts.name: models_to_views
integration_contracts.description: Las vistas DEBEN acceder a los modelos únicamente a través de managers y services. No queries directas en views.

rules.statement: accounts/views.py MUST import from accounts/models.py only via managers or services — never raw QuerySet construction
accounts/views.py MUST NOT call Model.objects.filter() or Model.objects.get() directly — MUST delegate to managers
academicTutoring/views.py MUST use ClassSession.objects.get_tutor_sessions() and get_client_sessions() — not raw filters
TutorSelectionView MUST call TutorProfile.objects.get_tutors_by_country_priority() or get_tutors_filtered_by_country() or get_tutors_fallback() — MUST NOT construct inline querysets

integration_contracts.name: views_to_urls
integration_contracts.description: Cada URL DEBE apuntar a una vista que existe. Los kwargs de URL DEBEN coincidir con los parámetros de las vistas.

rules.statement: Every URL pattern in accounts/urls*.py MUST resolve to a view class that exists in accounts/views.py — accepted forms: CBV with as_view(), FBV, or module-level alias created with as_view()
Every URL pattern in academicTutoring/urls.py MUST resolve to a view class that exists in academicTutoring/views.py
No URL pattern MUST NOT reference a view that has been removed or renamed without updating the URL

integration_contracts.name: views_to_services
integration_contracts.description: Las vistas DEBEN delegar lógica de negocio a services.py. Contratos de firma entre caller y callee DEBEN ser consistentes.

rules.statement: RegisterTutorView.form_valid() MUST call services.register_tutor() — not inline logic
RegisterClientView.form_valid() MUST call services.register_client() — not inline logic
academicTutoring/views.py MUST call academicTutoring/services.py for session lifecycle — create, confirm, cancel
No view MUST NOT contain transaction.atomic() blocks directly — MUST delegate to services
All service functions consumed by views MUST return tuple (bool, object|None, str|None) — MUST NOT raise exceptions toward views as error communication mechanism
Views MUST unpack service return as (success, result, error) 3-tuple — MUST NOT unpack as 2-tuple (success, error)
RequestSessionView.form_valid() MUST pass form object to create_session() — MUST NOT pass form.cleaned_data

integration_contracts.name: cross_app_contracts
integration_contracts.description: Contratos entre apps. accounts y academicTutoring DEBEN interoperar sin acoplamiento directo en views ni circular imports.

rules.statement: academicTutoring/models.py MUST reference accounts models only via ForeignKey — no direct method calls across apps
accounts/models.py MUST NOT import from academicTutoring — dependency is one-directional: academicTutoring → accounts
TutorDashboardView and ClientDashboardView MUST import ClassSession from academicTutoring.models inside method scope — not at module level to avoid circular imports
Field references across apps MUST use the actual field name — 'client' not 'student' in ClassSession.select_related()
academicTutoring/views.py MUST NOT import geo functions directly from geoconfig — MUST use academic_services or request.geo_data provided by middleware

integration_contracts.name: geo_contracts
integration_contracts.description: Contratos de integración entre geoconfig, middleware, CountryConfig model y views. La capa geo DEBE estar aislada y consumida correctamente.

rules.statement: geoconfig/middleware.py MUST import check_geo_restriction exclusively from geoconfig.geo — MUST NOT reimport from apps.academicTutoring.utils
geoconfig/geo.py MUST import CountryConfig inside function scope using apps.academicTutoring.models — MUST NOT import at module level to avoid circular imports
Middleware MUST attach geo_data to request object before passing to views — views MUST read geo_data from request.geo_data, never call geoconfig functions directly
CountryConfig MUST be queried only through get_country_config() in geoconfig/geo.py — MUST NOT be queried directly in middleware or views
apps/academicTutoring/utils/geo.py MUST NOT contain geo logic — MUST only re-export from geoconfig.geo

geo_data dict attached to request MUST contain keys: allowed, city, region, country, country_code, latitude, longitude, service_area, skip_check, country_config — views relying on any of these keys MUST handle None gracefully

audit_plan.description: get_tutors_by_country_priority() retorna TODOS los tutores activos ordenados — no filtra por país. RF-015-A dice MUST show tutors from ALL active countries — el método cumple porque no excluye ningún país.
audit_plan.justification: FP-CHECK — el challenger confunde ordering con filtering. get_tutors_by_country_priority devuelve todos, solo ordena por proximidad.

audit_plan.description: Extracción de country_code desde request.geo_data en views — cubierto por DL-P1-008. Acceso a contexto HTTP no es business logic.
audit_plan.justification: DL-P1-008 ya cubre este caso. No requiere fix.

audit_plan.description: register_tutor y register_client tienen @transaction.atomic. El challenger pide verificar scope pero ambas funciones son atómicas completas.
audit_plan.justification: FP-CHECK — @transaction.atomic presente y correcto. No requiere fix.

audit_plan.description: confirm_session tiene @transaction.atomic y solo actualiza ClassSession. El challenger especula sobre scope incompleto sin evidencia.
audit_plan.justification: FP-CHECK — no hay operaciones multi-modelo fuera del bloque atómico.

audit_plan.description: Docstring histórico menciona Milagro. Comentarios no son lógica ejecutable.
audit_plan.justification: FP-CHECK — docstrings no son lógica de negocio. RNF-011 aplica a código ejecutable.

audit_plan.description: Docstring histórico menciona Ecuador. Mismo caso que DL-P2-010.
audit_plan.justification: FP-CHECK — docstrings no son lógica ejecutable.

audit_plan.description: Middleware RULE-3 verifica geo_restricted — en latam-mvp todos los países tienen geo_restricted=False por lo que este bloque nunca ejecuta. El middleware lee CountryConfig dinámicamente.
audit_plan.justification: FP-CHECK — el código es correcto para main branch. En latam-mvp geo_restricted=False para todos los países elimina este path.

audit_plan.description: geo_country = request.session.get('geo_country', 'Ecuador') — default en session.get() cubierto por DL-P1-020.
audit_plan.justification: DL-P1-020 ya cubre este caso explícitamente.
